lore.item.bloom_festal.bloom_festal: A humble healing staff. Recovers 4 hp to its target.
lore.item.bloom_festal.sun_festal: A bright staff to embrace a brand new day. Recovers 10 hp to its target.
lore.item.bloom_festal.wane_festal: A staff to heal those beyond the horizon. Recovers 4 hp to its target, and has increased range.
lore.item.bloom_festal.moon_festal: A revitalizing staff to ward misfortune. Recovers 24 hp to its target.
lore.item.bloom_festal.great_festal: A bountiful staff that heals all within range for 4 hp.
lore.item.bloom_festal.levin_sword: A unique weapon that can slash be used to cast quick-moving thunder magic that deals 14 magic damage.
lore.item.bloom_festal.brave_lance: A spear that can be used for particularly swift jabs or can be held out to deal damage while charging.
lore.item.bloom_festal.guard_naginata: A slow spear that protects the wielder and can be used to jab or can be held out to deal damage while charging.
lore.item.bloom_festal.eclipse: A forbidden tome. Casts slow-moving dark magic that sets the target's hp to 1. Lethal if already 1 hp.
lore.item.bloom_festal.thoron: A magical tome. Casts quick-moving thunder magic that deals 14 magic damage.
lore.item.bloom_festal.rexcalibur: A magical tome. Casts quick-moving wind magic that deals 10 magic damage and heavy knockback. Effective against airborne enemies (2x damage).
